channel.title: GNtravel
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from GNtravel, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: When to Apply for Popular Capital One Credit Cards, Based on Offer History
item.description: A look at the historical sign-up offers on popular Capital One cards to help applicants determine whether current deals are competitive.

item.title: Bilt May Rent Day: Up to 100% Transfer Bonus and More Rewards
item.description: Bilt's May Rent Day promotion includes up to a 100% transfer bonus, double points on non-housing purchases, and additional member perks.

item.title: What's New at The Diplomat Beach Resort in Florida
item.description: The Diplomat, a well-known Florida resort, has undergone recent changes as it transitions to a new brand under the Hilton portfolio.

item.title: What Is a Credit Card Welcome Offer and How Does It Work?
item.description: An overview of how credit card welcome offers function, including spending requirements, timing considerations, and strategies for maximizing their value.
